reasons: Adversarial review of a commit diff touching QThread workers, session state, cache invalidation, and undo memory-budget semantics is high-risk correctness work.
The request explicitly asks for independent defect discovery and verification/refutation of concurrency and memory-accounting concerns.
Security/resource/architecture risks are in scope, so this should not be answered as simple low-risk work.
decision.panel_brief: Review only the supplied R4 diff. Enforce changed-line causality and reject pre-existing, style-only, or test-only noise. Focus on correctness, security, resources, architecture, async QThread/session races, cache invalidation, and undo memory-budget semantics. Specifically verify/refute: (A) content-based set[bytes] accounting may count equal but separately allocated snapshots once even though both remain resident; (B) thumbnail bridge signals carry generation but not session id while generation counters are per-session and can collide after tab switches. For each real issue provide exact file/lines, trigger, causal trace, severity, and confidence 0-100; also search independently for other >=80-confidence defects.

errors: panel: Fusion requires at least two usable candidates (claude[0]=error, claude[1]=error, antigravity[0]=error, antigravity[1]=error)
